user_prompt: The impact of remote work on mental health + Flow AI app productivity app
content:
In today’s world, where remote work is becoming the norm, it’s crucial to prioritize both productivity and mental health. At FlowAI, we understand the challenges of juggling endless tasks in a home office. That’s why we created FlowAI Core—your intelligent automation partner designed to give you back 2 precious hours every day.

Imagine a workday where repetitive tasks are handled without you lifting a finger. FlowAI learns your unique workflow and seamlessly integrates with over 50 tools you already use, allowing you to focus on what truly matters.

When you automate the mundane, you free up mental space for creativity and innovation, leading to a healthier work environment. Let’s break free from traditional work patterns and embrace a future where you can thrive. Work less, flow more—experience the difference with FlowAI and reclaim your time for what you love. Your mental well-being deserves it!

#RemoteWork #MentalHealth #WorkLifeBalance #FlowAI #ProductivityTools #DigitalWellness #MentalHealthAwareness #TechForGood

📰 Sources:
• [Flexible work broader than just working from home](https://www.abc.net.au/news/2026-05-26/flexible-work-broader-than-just-working-from-home/106697614)
• [Show HN: The Front Page – Newspaper-style front page for Hacker News](https://thefrontpage.dev/)
• [Is Japan Finally Changing Its Work Culture? The Truth About Work-Life Balance](https://whatjapanthinks.com/is-japan-changing-work-culture/)
• [Cyberattacks in supply chains: A multi-case study](https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0350010)
• [The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Sami Inkinen of Virta Health](https://tim.blog/2026/05/21/sami-inkinen-transcript/)

articles.title: Flexible work broader than just working from home
articles.description: A bill amending the Fair Work Act 2009 to include the right to work from home is too narrow in its focus and could lead to discrimination, according to submissions in a federal inquiry.

articles.title: Is Japan Finally Changing Its Work Culture? The Truth About Work-Life Balance
articles.description: For decades, Japan has been synonymous with intense work ethics, long office hours, and deep-rooted corporate loyalty. The image of salarymen working late into the night and prioritizing company over personal life has defined global perceptions of Japanese wo…

articles.title: Cyberattacks in supply chains: A multi-case study
articles.description: Supply chains are increasingly vulnerable to Supply Chain Cyberattacks (SCCAs) that exploit third-party trust and bypass traditional perimeter-based defenses. This study investigates the propagation mechanisms, impacts, and governance of SCCAs through a quali…

articles.title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Sami Inkinen of Virta Health — Reversing Type 2 Diabetes, Rowing 2,750 Miles, and Lessons from Fixing Metabolic Health in 100,000+ People (#866)
articles.description: Please enjoy this transcript of my interview with Sami Inkinen (@samiinkinen), a Finnish-born, Stanford-trained entrepreneur and the founder and CEO/president of Trulia and Virta Health. Virta is on a mission to reverse metabolic disease in one billion people…

denial_reason: The post promotes a product while encouraging productivity and mental health without any harmful or misleading content.
